problem_statement: Managing freelance invoices is tedious - I spend 2 hours a week tracking billable hours, creating invoices, and chasing payments across multiple tools.
gap_detected: No all-in-one solution that tracks time AND auto-generates invoices AND handles follow-ups

problem_statement: I can't easily share code snippets with syntax highlighting in Slack and Discord without using third-party tools that expire.
who_is_affected: Developers sharing code in team chats
gap_detected: No native, persistent, instant solution integrated with chat tools
monetization_potential: Freemium - free basic, paid for team features

problem_statement: I spend hours manually formatting CSV data from exports to match my database schema for imports.
existing_solutions: Python scripts, Excel, specialized ETL tools
gap_detected: No simple GUI tool for non-programmers to transform data
